goals.title: AgilePlus Spec-Driven Development Engine — Core Platform
goals.description: Build the foundational AgilePlus CLI + MCP server platform. Local, git+SQLite-backed spec-driven development engine running as a CLI sidecar alongside Claude Code and Codex. Harmonizes OpenSpec, spec-kitty, bmad, and GSD into a 7-command workflow. Decomposes into 5 independent repos: agileplus-proto, agileplus-core, agileplus-agents, agileplus-mcp, agileplus-integrations. Includes domain model (Feature state machine, governance contracts, audit chain), CLI commands (specify, research, plan, implement, review, merge, ship), MCP server (FastMCP 3.0), agent dispatch with worktree isolation, Plane.so bidirectional sync, and GitHub issue triage loop.
goals.evidence: WP00 and WP01 merged to main (agileplus-proto scaffold + agileplus-core Rust workspace). WP02-WP04 committed but not merged. WP05+ still planned. git log shows 23 WPs defined; only WP00-WP01 confirmed done via chore: Move WP01 to done.
deliverables: agileplus-proto: Shared gRPC + MCP proto contracts
agileplus-core: Rust workspace with 7 crates (domain, CLI, API, storage, agents, integrations, events)
agileplus-agents: Agent dispatch + review loop in Rust
agileplus-integrations: Plane.so + GitHub sync in Rust
Smart contract governance with hash-chained audit logs
Prompt router pattern via generated CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md

goals.title: AgilePlus Domain Model — Feature & State Machine
goals.description: Implement the core domain model: Feature entity with states (draft/specified/researching/planning/implementing/reviewing/merging/done/abandoned), WorkPackage entity with states (planned/doing/review/done/blocked), governance contract (smart contract with evidence-backed transitions), hash-chained audit log. Includes Rust structs, state machine transitions with guard predicates, and persistence via SQLite.
goals.evidence: Commit 'bc38710 Implement WP03: Domain model with Feature & state machine' exists. WP04 claimed but WP03 review status unclear. chore: Move WP01 to done confirms WP01 scaffold done.

goals.title: Org-Wide Release Governance and DX Automation
goals.description: Comprehensive DX infrastructure and release governance automation across all ~47 Phenotype org repos. Covers: GitHub Actions publishing workflows for npm, PyPI, and crates.io; pre-commit and pre-push hooks; Taskfile standardization; 5-tier release channel governance (alpha -> canary -> beta -> rc -> prod) with gate evaluation; package registry adapters; org-wide CLI bootstrap; pilot and full rollout. Replaces current manual publishing used by 44 of 47 repos.
goals.evidence: Spec and 15 WP task files created in kitty-specs/002-org-wide-release-governance-dx-automation/tasks/. No merge commits for 002 branches found in git log. meta.json created 2026-03-01.
deliverables: WP01: CLI scaffold and adapter interface
WP10: Centralized CI workflows (reusable GitHub Actions)

goals.title: AgilePlus Platform Completion — Infrastructure, Sync, Dashboard, Multi-Device
goals.description: End-to-end completion of AgilePlus as a production-ready local-first platform. Key deliverables: bidirectional Plane.so sync (WP08-WP10), platform service infrastructure with Process Compose (NATS, Dragonfly, Neo4j, MinIO) (WP04-WP07), event-sourced persistence with hash-chained audit trail (WP02-WP03), web dashboard (WP12-WP13), CLI platform/sync commands (WP10, WP14, WP18), OpenTelemetry observability (WP15), multi-device sync via P2P/Tailscale + git-backed state (WP16-WP17), and full benchmark + contract test suite (WP19-WP21).
goals.evidence: All 21 WPs (WP01-WP21) show 'chore: Move WPxx to done on spec 003' in git log. Merge commits for all 21 branches exist. Most recent: 'Merge branch 003-agileplus-platform-completion-WP21'. Docs expanded in 'docs: expand all 50+ doc pages with comprehensive content, mermaid diagrams'.
deliverables: WP03: SQLite schema extensions for event sourcing
WP07: Process Compose config (full service orchestration)
WP08: Plane.so bidirectional sync with state mapping, webhooks, retry queue
WP14: Platform CLI commands (up/down/status/logs, events query, dashboard)
WP20: Contract tests for crate boundaries
WP21: Criterion performance benchmarks for all subsystems
50+ expanded documentation pages with mermaid diagrams

goals.title: Decompose AgilePlus into Multi-Repo Microservice Architecture
goals.description: Restructure AgilePlus from a monorepo (12 Rust crates + Python MCP) into 5 independent microservice repositories (agileplus-proto, agileplus-core, agileplus-mcp, agileplus-agents, agileplus-integrations) following CLEAN/SOLID/Hexagonal architecture. Prevents scope creep, enables independent scaling and versioning. User specifically asked whether to modularize into multiple separate interlinking standalone projects and services.
goals.evidence: Spec 001 was updated to include multi-repo architecture table. Session eebb9479 shows 'Implement the following plan: Decompose AgilePlus into Multi-Repo Microservice Architecture'. WP00 (agileplus-proto scaffold) merged to main.
deliverables: Repository boundary definitions and gRPC contracts

goals.title: DX/AX/UX Parity Setup Across AgilePlus
goals.description: Completion of DX (developer experience), AX (agent experience), and UX (user experience) parity setups for AgilePlus. Referenced via stop hook feedback message 'Completion of above of parity of DXAXUX setups.'
goals.evidence: Referenced in session 46326590 stop hook feedback. No specific branch or commit evidence found for this exact goal.

goals.title: heliosApp Desktop Shell — Fork co(lab) and Build Terminal-First Agent IDE
goals.description: Fork blackboardsh/colab (ElectroBun desktop shell), strip the embedded editor and browser chrome, and rebuild as a Claude Code desktop-app-like solution with terminal-first layout. Uses ElectroBun as desktop shell, Zellij for terminal multiplexing, Ghostty as primary renderer, par for lane orchestration. Establishes command palette scaffolding, window management, and app lifecycle. Described by user as 'insanely snappy while having rich native UI/UX'.
goals.evidence: Session b9ea41a3 shows user describing this plan. Session 49919176 shows 'Integrate heliosApp Runtime into co(lab) Fork' plan being executed. heliosApp AGENTS.md lists '001-colab-agent-terminal-control-plane' as active tech context. 30 specs exist in kitty-specs/. git log shows WPs being worked across multiple specs but ongoing stabilization and CI issues.
deliverables: Forked co(lab) base with ElectroBun shell
Renderer adapter interface with transactional switching

goals.title: heliosApp Local Bus v1 Protocol
goals.description: Internal command/response/event bus for heliosApp. The nervous system: every subsystem communicates through the local bus. Scope: envelope schema, correlation IDs, method and topic registries, deterministic event sequencing, validation, and error taxonomy. Transport-agnostic contract layer.
goals.evidence: Spec 002 exists in kitty-specs. git log shows 'chore: Move WP02 to for_review on spec 002' and 'chore: Move WP03 to for_review on spec 002'. Also 'refactor(runtime): harden bus and event surfaces with typed envelopes' committed to main.
deliverables: Envelope schema with typed message contracts

goals.title: heliosApp Workspace and Project Metadata Persistence
goals.description: Workspace CRUD and project bootstrap for heliosApp. Create, open, close, and delete workspaces; bind projects to workspaces; manage root paths; persist metadata. MVP uses in-memory storage with JSON snapshots; durability phase migrates to SQLite.
goals.evidence: Spec 003 exists in kitty-specs. git log shows WP activity across specs. 'fix(runtime): stabilize sharing types' committed.

goals.title: heliosApp MVP Agent IDE — Production-Quality Transform
goals.description: Transform the helios debug dashboard into a production-quality agent-first desktop IDE. Core features: conversational chat loop with AI agent, real-time tool call streaming, agent reasoning visibility, action approval/rejection, multi-file editor with syntax highlighting, integrated terminal lanes, git workflow integration, model selector, and context file picker.
goals.evidence: Spec 030 created 2026-03-01 in kitty-specs/030-helios-mvp-agent-ide/. No merge commits for spec 030 found in recent git log. Status: Draft.

goals.title: heliosApp Full Usable MVP — No Stubs, Real UI
goals.description: User explicitly demanded: 'complete remainder of work to usable real MVP, current is stubs / fulfills no user stories, and has no UI or performance/reasonable overhauls over colab nor most of tech stack impl. We require full usable implementation and full quality cov/pass.' Reject stub-only delivery; all 30 specs must yield actual working features, not scaffolding.
goals.evidence: Session fcdc1e49 stop hook feedback contains this exact demand. git log shows ongoing WP work across specs 004, 005, 007-012, 021-022, 028 and stabilization PRs being merged.
deliverables: All 30 heliosApp specs delivered as working implementations
Full quality gate pass (lint, typecheck, tests)
Actual UI/UX differentiation over co(lab) baseline

goals.title: heliosApp Toolchain Migration — Biome to OXC/VoidZero Stack
goals.description: Migrate from Biome v1.9.4 for formatting/linting to the OXC/VoidZero stack (oxlint, oxfmt, tsgolint/tsgo). Already adopted in sibling 'thegent' repo. Goal: faster lint/format with better TypeScript support.
goals.evidence: Session fcdc1e49 shows 'Implement the following plan: Migrate Biome to OXC/VoidZero Stack'. Unclear if this was completed or interrupted. heliosApp uses biome.json at root suggesting Biome still active.
deliverables: Updated CI to use OXC stack

goals.title: heliosApp Phase 2 Decompose — Runtime Decomposition and Stabilization
goals.description: After 30 features (97 WPs) merged to main, execute refactor/phase2-decompose: decompose the runtime into pty/renderer/secrets/lanes services. Recovery after crashed session with 420 uncommitted modified files. Fix PTY signal test hangs, biome lint errors, CI self-merge gate.
goals.evidence: git log shows 'refactor: decompose runtime into pty/renderer/secrets/lanes services (#40)' merged. 'chore: finish recovery lint cleanup and tests' merged. 'chore: finalize heliosApp devops hardening and queue publish docs' merged. Clean main with 0 uncommitted files.

Review bot governance documentation and configuration

goals.title: heliosCLI — Fork and Optimize OpenAI Codex CLI
goals.description: Fork openai/codex CLI for performance optimization, Rust multi-language N-way merge, and custom helios modifications. Includes: TUI renderer optimization research and architecture walkthrough, N-way merge with Rust core / Go transport / Zig / Python benchmarks, animated ASCII logo, upstream feature mining from codex PRs, absorb strategy from portage fork, and a comprehensive performance improvement roadmap.
goals.evidence: git log: 'feat: N-way merge - heliosCLI with Rust core, Go transport, Zig, Python benchmarks', 'feat(loader): animated ascii logo to HELIOS startup morph', 'feat(lane-l1 through l7): realtime protocol, memory mode, runtime, audio, etc.' Absorb/archive readiness package added. Ongoing upstream sync with openai/codex.
deliverables: N-way merge: Rust core (helios-rs), Go transport, Zig, Python benchmarks
Animated ASCII logo morph on startup
Helios-rs Rust crate in crates/ directory
Absorb readiness package for portage fork

goals.title: heliosCLI PR Completion and CI Stabilization
goals.description: Complete and merge all outstanding open PRs in heliosCLI to main with CI/quality checks stabilized. User directed: use worktrees in .git or ../heliosCLI-worktrees, use agents to get all current PRs complete and merged to main, CI/quality checks stabilized. Handle ~200 branches per repo owned by us.
goals.evidence: Session 5f599a41 shows this exact request. git log shows ongoing PRs being merged. Recent commit 'chore: normalize dirty worktree snapshot (2026-03-03)' and 'chore: prep absorb stack via manifest diff checklist' suggest work in progress.
deliverables: All open PRs merged to main

goals.title: heliosCLI Upstream Feature Mining from openai/codex
goals.description: Evaluate upstream PRs/issues from openai/codex, other forks (portage), and related repos for feature mining. OpenAI closed codex to external contributions on 2026-02-28, creating a differentiation window. Mine unmerged community PRs (markdown table rendering, plugin system, model toggle, MCP recovery, vim mode, OSC-52 copy, realtime audio, etc.) for integration into heliosCLI.
goals.evidence: git log: 'docs: add upstream research for feature mining action plans (#293)', 'UPSTREAM_MINING_REPORT.md' and 'CODEX_PR_ANALYSIS.md' committed. CODEX_FORKS_RESEARCH.md and CODEX_PR_QUICK_REFERENCE.txt exist in repo root.
deliverables: UPSTREAM_MINING_REPORT.md with top 10 unmerged PRs ranked
Feature implementation action plans for top PRs
Issue backlog of critical bugs to fix

goals.title: Cross-Repo Code Reduction and Modularization (Hexagonal Refactor)
goals.description: Post hexagonal-architecture refactoring audit revealed LOC bloat, god modules, dead code, and modularization opportunities across 6 repos (thegent, heliosCLI, heliosApp, AgilePlus, and others). Goal: reduce LOC using lossless compression approach (fix optimally, not simplify/remove). Use 10-15 haiku agents for audit first.
goals.evidence: Session a0ec467e shows 'Implement the following plan: Cross-Repo Code Reduction and Modularization Plan'. thegent shows hexagonal Phase 1 refactor merged. heliosCLI and heliosApp show ongoing work. Lane agents dispatched but some lanes found target directories didn't exist.

goals.source_detail: git log: hexagonal architecture, uv workspace, DI container, async I/O
goals.title: thegent Hexagonal Architecture Refactor and uv Workspace Decomposition
goals.description: Comprehensive refactor of thegent from monolith to hexagonal architecture. Phase 1: hexagonal architecture patterns. Phase 2: uv workspace decomposition into 13 packages. Phase 3: DI container + break 4 circular dependencies + convert 5 singletons. Phase 4: async I/O, structured logging, error wrapping. Phase 5: remove monolith leaf modules migrated to workspace packages. Also includes module split into separate packages (mcp, control-plane, execution, governance, app).
goals.evidence: git log: 'refactor: hexagonal architecture Phase 1 (#519)', 'refactor: uv workspace decomposition with 13 packages (#523)', 'refactor: DI container + break 4 circular dependencies + convert 5 singletons (#526)', 'refactor: async I/O, structured logging, error wrapping (#527)', 'refactor: remove monolith leaf modules migrated to workspace packages (#531)'. All merged to main.

goals.title: Cross-Repo Lossless Code Reduction and Optimization
goals.description: User explicitly described goal as: optimize code / reduce LOC while increasing the optimality of the features. Not simplifying or removing items/implementations but actually optimally fixing. 'Easier view is a performance view: rather than using lossy use lossless compression.' Use 10-15 haiku agents for audit first. Targets: thegent, heliosCLI, heliosApp, AgilePlus, and others.

deliverables: LOC reduction audit across all repos

goals.description: User requested: model all session goals as semantic tasks/client requests, harmonize to a unified set of specs/expectations (extend existing ones), and add to a worklog.md covering every past task (pre-plan refactors) and new tasks. This goal (the current audit) is itself the deliverable of this request.

The current raw-goals.json is the primary deliverable.

goals.title: Session Deduplication and Crash Recovery Protocol

goals.evidence: Session 08a5b3fb specifically addresses this. User: 'this session was duplicated w/o a fork, and it seems after a crash i now lost 2 of 4 of my claude chats.' Agent identified surviving sessions and recovered context.
deliverables: Protocol guidance for session fork vs reuse
